completed_notes.note: Architect handoff, SNT attack, and promotion contracts frozen into canonical mission artifacts.
Shared build-proof contract fails closed on commit-only and missing SHA.
Founder build poll/readback and transport truth wired through build-proof contract.
Canonical completion helper created and tested; Point B TECHNICAL_PASS with founder false now remains incomplete for scheduler truth.
BP queue helper, scheduler, runner, and readiness surfaces rewired to shared completion semantics.
Shared self-repair escalation policy created; executor now uses three same-tier attempts with stage metadata, and founder build jobs no longer show completed from committed row state alone.

Carry-forward retry context is now explicit: self-repair execution logs and memory persist attempt stage + required context, founder build retries attach attempt_context, and quorum escalation inherits prior attempts plus loaded lessons instead of deliberating statelessly.

completed_notes.note: Improvement loop output is no longer advisory-only by structure: each item now carries a deterministic blueprint-delta contract with mission/step ownership, proof requirements, disposition, and promotion requirements while keeping a single governed stream.

Post-acceptance artifact sync is now governed through one helper: technical PASS and founder usability confirmation both refresh BP truth, artifact freshness, and the product readiness report together; stale-looking current surfaces are explicitly marked against OBJECTIVE_VERDICT timestamps.
verified_by: node --test tests/builderos-artifact-sync.test.js tests/founder-usability-confirm.test.js tests/bp-priority-sync.test.js tests/builderos-improvement-loop.test.js tests/self-repair-attempt-context.test.js tests/founder-build-job-store.test.js tests/builderos-command-control-service.test.js tests/build-proof-contract.test.js tests/lifeos-execution-truth.test.js

completed_notes.note: Founder UI alpha truth scripts hardened; founder-ui-proof reuses fresh E2E drawer build proof and delegates B1 terminal proof to real_app_e2e when satisfied.

Active autonomy spine files now point at the canonical authority chain instead of amendment-first drift, and the legacy shadow queue runner is explicitly marked HISTORY_ONLY so cold agents are less likely to confuse Hist artifacts with active BuilderOS orchestration.
